THIS JUDGMENT WAS BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFFF, MARIA ALICIA ASSOCIATES SHALL HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 3090- 16TH STREET, #207, SAN FRANCISCO. A MONEY JUDGMENT OF $5,500 FOR RENT AND DAMAGES IS ALSO AWARDED PLAINTIFF. THIS COVERS THE MONTHS FROM 11-1-94 TO 5-4-95. THE DEFENDANTS HAVE A $500 SECURITY DEPOSIT WHICH SHALL BE APPLIED TO THE JUDGMENT LEAVING A BALANCE OF $5000. A WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE BUT SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL 5-20=95, 5 PM. EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS.
